items.title: S01E01 - Sleeping Partners
items.summary: Now a fully qualified but unemployed chef, Robin Tripp harbours dreams of opening his own bistro. He is helped by his girlfriend Vicky Nicholls — but hindered by her father James.

infolabels.title: Sleeping Partners
infolabels.plot: Now a fully qualified but unemployed chef, Robin Tripp harbours dreams of opening his own bistro. He is helped by his girlfriend Vicky Nicholls — but hindered by her father James.

items.title: S01E02 - The Bistro Kids
items.summary: Opening day approaches at the bistro and Robin has problems with a stuffed bear, half a pig and a Public Health Inspector.

infolabels.title: The Bistro Kids
infolabels.plot: Opening day approaches at the bistro and Robin has problems with a stuffed bear, half a pig and a Public Health Inspector.

items.title: S01E03 - A Little Competition
items.summary: Robin knew he'd have competition from the restaurant next door, but it turns out to be worse than expected.

infolabels.title: A Little Competition
infolabels.plot: Robin knew he'd have competition from the restaurant next door, but it turns out to be worse than expected.

items.title: S01E04 - The Maternal Triangle
items.summary: Robin is not keen to meet Vicky's mother, since he's heard she has a nasty habit of hitting people on the nose. The new dish washer thinks he can cope single-handed, but Vicky isn't sure.

infolabels.title: The Maternal Triangle
infolabels.plot: Robin is not keen to meet Vicky's mother, since he's heard she has a nasty habit of hitting people on the nose. The new dish washer thinks he can cope single-handed, but Vicky isn't sure.

items.title: S01E05 - Piggy in the Middle
items.summary: Vicky's father decides the restaurant needs some splashes of colour on the walls. Fortunately, he's romantically involved with a young female artist who thinks he is up to the job...

infolabels.title: Piggy in the Middle
infolabels.plot: Vicky's father decides the restaurant needs some splashes of colour on the walls. Fortunately, he's romantically involved with a young female artist who thinks he is up to the job...

items.title: S01E06 - A Matter of Note
items.summary: When a counterfeit ten pound note finds its way into the bistro till, Robin must attend a police ID parade. But he picks the wrong man and worries about sparking off an underworld vendetta...

infolabels.title: A Matter of Note
infolabels.plot: When a counterfeit ten pound note finds its way into the bistro till, Robin must attend a police ID parade. But he picks the wrong man and worries about sparking off an underworld vendetta...

items.title: S01E07 - Oh Happy Day
items.summary: Vicky wonders whether it's time to tie the knot with Robin. A quiet wedding for two is planned, but Nicholls has other plans.

infolabels.title: Oh Happy Day
infolabels.plot: Vicky wonders whether it's time to tie the knot with Robin. A quiet wedding for two is planned, but Nicholls has other plans.

items.title: S02E01 - As Long as He Needs Me
items.summary: James Nicholls is unwell and Vicky feels she should move in to look after him. Robin fears it's a plan to force them apart.

infolabels.title: As Long as He Needs Me
infolabels.plot: James Nicholls is unwell and Vicky feels she should move in to look after him. Robin fears it's a plan to force them apart.

items.title: S02E02 - The Seven Pound Fiddle
items.summary: Money is missing from the till. Nicholls blames Albert and sacks him. But when it becomes clear he is not guilty, they have trouble finding him to apologise - especially with the police involved.

infolabels.title: The Seven Pound Fiddle
infolabels.plot: Money is missing from the till. Nicholls blames Albert and sacks him. But when it becomes clear he is not guilty, they have trouble finding him to apologise - especially with the police involved.

items.title: S02E03 - Ups & Downs
items.summary: The discovery of a cellar underneath the restaurant causes friction between Nicholls and Robin.

infolabels.title: Ups & Downs
infolabels.plot: The discovery of a cellar underneath the restaurant causes friction between Nicholls and Robin.

items.title: S02E04 - Three Times Table
items.summary: Robin decides to 'go continental' and put tables outside the restaurant. This annoys the owner of the steakhouse next door and he makes a take-over bid for Robin's Nest.

infolabels.title: Three Times Table
infolabels.plot: Robin decides to 'go continental' and put tables outside the restaurant. This annoys the owner of the steakhouse next door and he makes a take-over bid for Robin's Nest.

items.title: S02E05 - Great Expectations
items.summary: Victoria thinks she is pregnant, something that delights Robin and upsets Nicholls - though he soon has big plans for his grandchild...

infolabels.title: Great Expectations
infolabels.plot: Victoria thinks she is pregnant, something that delights Robin and upsets Nicholls - though he soon has big plans for his grandchild...

items.title: S02E06 - Love & Marriage
items.summary: The big day has arrived and Robin and Victoria are actually getting married. Will Nicholls interfere with their plans ?

infolabels.title: Love & Marriage
infolabels.plot: The big day has arrived and Robin and Victoria are actually getting married. Will Nicholls interfere with their plans ?

items.title: S03E01 - You Need Hands
items.summary: Despite Nicholls' grand plans for a cabaret, the restaurant has bigger problems: Robin has damaged his cooking arm, and Albert refuses to lend a hand.

infolabels.title: You Need Hands
infolabels.plot: Despite Nicholls' grand plans for a cabaret, the restaurant has bigger problems: Robin has damaged his cooking arm, and Albert refuses to lend a hand.

items.title: S03E02 - The Candidate
items.summary: Nicholls decides to run as a candidate in the local elections, using the restaurant as his campaign headquarters.

infolabels.title: The Candidate
infolabels.plot: Nicholls decides to run as a candidate in the local elections, using the restaurant as his campaign headquarters.

items.title: S03E03 - Just Desserts
items.summary: Nicholls gets his fingers burned when an old flame of Robin's returns. Robin flies the nest and moves in with his father-in-law.

infolabels.title: Just Desserts
infolabels.plot: Nicholls gets his fingers burned when an old flame of Robin's returns. Robin flies the nest and moves in with his father-in-law.

items.title: S03E04 - Away from All What?
items.summary: It has been ages since Vicky and Robin had a holiday. But Nicholls refuses to pay for a stand-in chef.

infolabels.title: Away from All What?
infolabels.plot: It has been ages since Vicky and Robin had a holiday. But Nicholls refuses to pay for a stand-in chef.

items.title: S03E05 - England Expects
items.summary: Nicholls' regimental reunion is due, and where better for him to hold it than Robin's Nest ?

infolabels.title: England Expects
infolabels.plot: Nicholls' regimental reunion is due, and where better for him to hold it than Robin's Nest ?

items.title: S03E06 - Once Two is Three
items.summary: When Robin has the chance to open a new restaurant in Brighton, Nicholls is determined to scupper the deal.

infolabels.title: Once Two is Three
infolabels.plot: When Robin has the chance to open a new restaurant in Brighton, Nicholls is determined to scupper the deal.

items.title: S03E07 - Dinner Date
items.summary: An old girlfriend returns to England and recaptures Nicholls' fancy. Is marriage on the cards ?

infolabels.title: Dinner Date
infolabels.plot: An old girlfriend returns to England and recaptures Nicholls' fancy. Is marriage on the cards ?

items.title: S03E08 - Everything You Wish Yourself
items.summary: When is a birthday not a birthday ? And why does Nicholls want to know his daughter's vital statistics ?

infolabels.title: Everything You Wish Yourself
infolabels.plot: When is a birthday not a birthday ? And why does Nicholls want to know his daughter's vital statistics ?

items.title: S03E09 - Be It Ever So Humble
items.summary: There's a crisis when Albert resigns as a washer upper and Vicky and Robin discover they've been breaking the law.

infolabels.title: Be It Ever So Humble
infolabels.plot: There's a crisis when Albert resigns as a washer upper and Vicky and Robin discover they've been breaking the law.

items.title: S03E10 - Day Trippers
items.summary: Robin and Vicky decide there's nothing like a nice peaceful picnic on their day off. And that's exactly what they get...

infolabels.title: Day Trippers
infolabels.plot: Robin and Vicky decide there's nothing like a nice peaceful picnic on their day off. And that's exactly what they get...

items.title: S03E11 - The Long Distance Runner
items.summary: Has Robin really decided to take up jogging, or does he have other reasons for going out early every morning ?

infolabels.title: The Long Distance Runner
infolabels.plot: Has Robin really decided to take up jogging, or does he have other reasons for going out early every morning ?

items.title: S03E12 - At Harm's Length
items.summary: Vicky thinks her Uncle Sam is playing around with another woman. Despite Robin's fears, she decides to take action...

infolabels.title: At Harm's Length
infolabels.plot: Vicky thinks her Uncle Sam is playing around with another woman. Despite Robin's fears, she decides to take action...

items.title: S03E13 - The Happy Hen
items.summary: Nicholls buys the building next door to Robin's Nest to open an omelette house. However, he ends up with egg on his face.

infolabels.title: The Happy Hen
infolabels.plot: Nicholls buys the building next door to Robin's Nest to open an omelette house. However, he ends up with egg on his face.

items.title: S04E01 - Should Auld Acquaintance
items.summary: The bistro, newly decorated and open for business, faces sudden closure after Robin encounters an old friend in dire need.

infolabels.title: Should Auld Acquaintance
infolabels.plot: The bistro, newly decorated and open for business, faces sudden closure after Robin encounters an old friend in dire need.

items.title: S04E02 - Person Friday Required
items.summary: A meeting with an old colleague starts Vicky wondering if it's wise for husbands and wives to work together.

infolabels.title: Person Friday Required
infolabels.plot: A meeting with an old colleague starts Vicky wondering if it's wise for husbands and wives to work together.

items.title: S04E03 - Lost Weekend
items.summary: Lucky Albert wins a weekend away from it all. But a little conniving turns it into a busman's holiday for Robin and Vicky.

infolabels.title: Lost Weekend
infolabels.plot: Lucky Albert wins a weekend away from it all. But a little conniving turns it into a busman's holiday for Robin and Vicky.

items.title: S04E04 - Too Many Waiters Spoil the Bistro
items.summary: Nicholls plans to boost profits by increasing the number of tables. This leads to an increase in staff - and in problems.

infolabels.title: Too Many Waiters Spoil the Bistro
infolabels.plot: Nicholls plans to boost profits by increasing the number of tables. This leads to an increase in staff - and in problems.

items.title: S04E05 - September Song
items.summary: Robin's relationship with Nicholls hits a new low when Vicky comes home to find them brawling in the street.

infolabels.title: September Song
infolabels.plot: Robin's relationship with Nicholls hits a new low when Vicky comes home to find them brawling in the street.

items.title: S04E06 - Sorry Partner
items.summary: Robin and Vicky are kept busy when Nicholls tries to recapture lost glory on the badminton court.

infolabels.title: Sorry Partner
infolabels.plot: Robin and Vicky are kept busy when Nicholls tries to recapture lost glory on the badminton court.

items.title: S04E07 - Albert's Ball
items.summary: Albert's anniversary party looks like being his farewell party when Robin's Nest acquires a pest.

infolabels.title: Albert's Ball
infolabels.plot: Albert's anniversary party looks like being his farewell party when Robin's Nest acquires a pest.

items.title: S04E08 - Christmas at Robin's Nest
items.summary: Christmas at Robin's Nest is just like anywhere else - bad tempers and frayed nerves, with just a hint of seasonal goodwill.

infolabels.plot: Christmas at Robin's Nest is just like anywhere else - bad tempers and frayed nerves, with just a hint of seasonal goodwill.

items.title: S05E01 - Pastures New
items.summary: Robin is fed up with slaving over a hot stove and decides to fly the nest in favour of warmer climes.

infolabels.title: Pastures New
infolabels.plot: Robin is fed up with slaving over a hot stove and decides to fly the nest in favour of warmer climes.

items.title: S05E02 - A Man of Property
items.summary: With Robin and Vicky's baby due, they realise they will need more room in the Nest - but where will they find it ?

infolabels.title: A Man of Property
infolabels.plot: With Robin and Vicky's baby due, they realise they will need more room in the Nest - but where will they find it ?

items.title: S05E03 - If You Pass 'Go' Collect £200
items.summary: Robin wants to buy out his father-in-law's share of the bistro.

infolabels.title: If You Pass 'Go' Collect £200
infolabels.plot: Robin wants to buy out his father-in-law's share of the bistro.

items.title: S05E04 - Never Look a Gift Horse...
items.summary: Prospective grandparents can often get more excited than parents-to-be, and Robin's mother-in-law, Marion, is no exception.

infolabels.plot: Prospective grandparents can often get more excited than parents-to-be, and Robin's mother-in-law, Marion, is no exception.

items.title: S05E05 - Just an Old-Fashioned Girl
items.summary: Robin and Vicky become 'go-betweens', for both Nicholls and Gertrude and Albert...

items.title: S05E06 - Great Expectations
items.summary: The signs are all there that the baby is imminent: Nicholls is tense, Robin is having nightmares and Vicky is bored.

infolabels.plot: The signs are all there that the baby is imminent: Nicholls is tense, Robin is having nightmares and Vicky is bored.

items.title: S05E07 - Christmas at Robin's Nest: No Room at the Inn
items.summary: Christmas dinner at the bistro; with three men and a turkey, the family get-together lacks a woman's touch.

items.title: S06E01 - Move over Darling
items.summary: Running a bistro and trying to visit Vicky and the babies isn't easy, so Robin decides to delegate.

items.title: S06E02 - The Homecoming
items.summary: It's time for Vicky and the twins to come home, but Robin and Nicholls cannot agree on whose car she should travel in.

infolabels.plot: It's time for Vicky and the twins to come home, but Robin and Nicholls cannot agree on whose car she should travel in.

items.summary: Albert suspects Gertrude is seeing another man.

items.title: S06E04 - When Irish Eyes are Smiling
items.summary: In need of a break, Robin and Vicky go to stay with Grandad.

items.title: S06E05 - Anniversary Waltz
items.summary: With all the food pre-cooked for a private party, it seems the ideal night for Vicky and Robin to go out. What could go wrong ?

items.summary: When Nicholls decides his daughter needs a bit of a break, his generosity knows no bounds...

items.summary: When Robin is offered a lucrative new job, Nicholls has no option but to put the restaurant up for sale. Is this the end of Robin's Nest ?
